scripts.electron:build: cd ../client && bun run build && cd ../client-electron && vite build && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:mac: cd ../client && bun run build && cd ../client-electron && vite build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:win: cd ../client && bun run build && cd ../client-electron && vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:linux: cd ../client && bun run build && cd ../client-electron && vite build && electron-builder --linux
